cves.description: Buffer overflow in the FPDFBookmark_GetTitle method in Foxit PDF SDK DLL before 3.1.1.5005 allows context-dependent attackers to execute arbitrary code via unspecified vectors.

FPDI is a collection of PHP classes that facilitate reading pages from existing PDF documents and using them as templates in FPDF. In versions 2.6.2 and below, any application that uses FPDI to proces
An arbitrary file upload vulnerability in the AddFont() function of FPDF v1.86 and earlier allows attackers to execute arbitrary code via uploading a crafted PHP file.
